title: Senior Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!
